text.title: Secrets Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: ESO + IRSA/Workload Identity to cloud-native backend
ESO + Vault with Kubernetes auth method
OIDC trust to cloud IAM; no static keys
instance-profile / AppRole; rotation via cron + backend
execution-role IAM; fetch from backend at invocation
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Workload runtime? → matches branch "runtime == kubernetes" → conclusion ref=r2-eso-for-k8s
